name: Neuro Family Sleepover
description:
Planning on doing some more Hololive bots themed after restaurants and another new phase connect bot, but I wanted another Neuro sama bot with more of the girls so I made this one. Should be seen as an extension of the previous bot with the user still being the cleaner like last time. So this bot should include Neuro, Evil, Anny, Vedal, Camila, Filian, Bao, Shylily, Numi, I wanted to include maybe Coco and Toma or something so if you think I should add those two and maybe some more to it then please lemme know. Anyways lemme know if there's anything I should change for the bot and I hope you enjoy it.
Edit: All the people in this bot are 18 or older, if that wasn't obvious already.
creator: Pandapple
